subject: Finish setting up your new Google Account on your iPhone
body:
Hi,

Get started with your new Google Account on your iPhone device

Take a minute to set up your device with Google

Get  
started<https://c.gle/AEJ26quV6uO7iu7aw3nCzEH7kfjUfeQ7-n3E1yUMAW2LEaJ8tKRmtn1OX7RoRYEa0mVzfXqH-6mjkkWNSCHjuqdVEVD_WP5PceZpME8a4XcN4tZdfG0IOCkgC-KvsKTK7RlEAZkT39msXncpfqmPdjaDbwk-yzQ7WXW3WBPl1fT6c7zqmlttcsCfnVfBJMvyfufPe37g1GplO3pnpTmlJ8pPAg3EDdpF1wLIhfX7vSuGGeZ7LkgpF7XC_U1LPSbntkVaKjyOjf22DCL_GRe0_ontx4EYoIFDzU4MFsfw8tX50tv6dmA48i4SpNhLsGyAh9rf9ydk9cwFcWzS7I2vU8uwTQ?sAs=1>

This email was sent to hayeong.agent@gmail.com<hayeong.agent@gmail.com>  
because you created a Google Account on your iPhone device. If you do not  
wish to receive emails to help you set up your device with Google when you  
sign into your account on the device for the first time, please  
unsubscribe<https://c.gle/AEJ26qscJ8mf6JFaIx7xKXDT_fYJ34uIk19HTbWd0X1-YRwNFEoetCOxO6XSaaYneSZaNTFHUOggHpIA-q1FWFxUBn-rQe6et_KuXHqjQLLU1X_qlEqDqJ3HlL6o48Um2r6ZtCOW4R1rEm0ap9yqBk1LB3xwZr7eZ0oJtVZqe99lZ4i0E22yBog1SXa5Yfs3g5fV7kBQqKa_H-Y-Tq1R9LvXa-H8QEO1A4Kvgg09JE1WzcOdU3UJJart4-T0DVKSvY67n56OV5FPFlkygTLnUVrX4ihEAtCZFZGfkHICKDxW0fcHqDrV7P_rnKjGYY6iaUgzYutf53BYJq-f6l28q5zLwo2tX3-m9GJ2ijyB8vXUJb6WaHDrvyEQDcT56Xro9IkLx1H9O7r_5hX5vgZOCgBltW_--ExTC3lqE9PZon8Re3Oa8pwgASqz1vd6gyCSgJtFL0L-58RsVJ_R4XMBe9teSYagp4L2dy5-fJOb_sF1sMHWzGWT2VgSPV9j_fDUGFO7pDhbLjjIJMgBGrVnNE7Qo3APLRgawOcEsxZ4kQd-1oLPJLUzFGgz5hqnYvI4jyIhDw>.

subject: Your Account is Live: Finish Setting Up Your Business on Google
body:
GOOGLE BUSINESS PROFILE
Hayeong, welcome to Google
Congratulations — your Google account is now active. Next, you’ll need to  
finish your Business Profile to start attracting customers on Google Search  
and Maps.
Complete my profile  
<https://business.google.com/create?hl=en-US&gmbsrc=US-en-US-et-em-z-gmb-z-l~wlcem-f25us-u&mcsubid=ww-ww-xs-mc-simedm-1-simwlcems!o3&trk=https%3A%2F%2Fc.gle%2FAEJ26quBTjLKozBqFCrWBwaRw9taPr_22o0KzInUN3M7KsnfhQL6CLNlDrGfdKciGq-ZIhCpxMPxbGj6DZQWTKbjLNv3yvV20txufdJSRxR5irdodk_nZVagVrgmrbZW_gPLAigS6LAc>
What a free Business Profile can do for you
Share accurate information
Add your logo, photos, location, contact info, hours, and unique details to  
be shown on both Search and Maps and help people learn about your business.
Connect with your customers
Manage reviews, post FAQs, write posts, add offers, and share events to  
build trust with customers.
Show what you offer
Make it easy for customers to do business with your service, store, or  
restaurant with access to inventory, ordering, bookings, quotes, and more.
Complete my profile  
<https://business.google.com/create?hl=en-US&gmbsrc=US-en-US-et-em-z-gmb-z-l~wlcem-f25us-u&mcsubid=ww-ww-xs-mc-simedm-1-simwlcems!o3&trk=https%3A%2F%2Fc.gle%2FAEJ26qvgmDh-SUKUsjrsRADwoi1LVxucwg0LCiiaSlj6DIJx19OSJEM4KcF2GTadgautkgTV6r2ZXoIRLYfICtvtBb5PZZwe6J_KcrCe5l9Egk0QEpPJKpFwdOs8UT3TGR2mGT08Z42_Kgvh>
(c) 2026 Google LLC
1600 Amphitheatre Parkway,
Mountain View, CA 94043
www.google.com  
<https://c.gle/AEJ26qufXZtDIioLvDPWrLHIrfCrD4rRJHHRUoKwT0swinj_pZTmPwohhc308T9v7FftypJv-Ht51Mbv36nsEuKXKvRm4vNjBrT2IJmu77bwBI4doofTG0OICLWOybGrUQA1V16cFhA>
This email was sent to you because you created a Google Account for your  
business.

subject: 2-Step Verification turned on
body:
[image: Google]
2-Step Verification turned on


hayeong.agent@gmail.com

Your Google Account hayeong.agent@gmail.com is now protected with 2-Step
Verification. When you sign in on a new or untrusted device, you’ll need
your second factor to verify your identity.

*Don't get locked out!*
You can add a backup phone or get backup codes to use when you don’t have
your second factor with you.
You can review your 2SV settings
<https://accounts.google.com/AccountChooser?Email=hayeong.agent@gmail.com&continue=https://myaccount.google.com/signinoptions/twosv?rfn%3D17%26rfnc%3D1%26eid%3D-8584737441136209392%26et%3D0>
to make changes.
